holdings.infoBox: GIAX is an equity ETF with a total of 90 individual holdings. The top holdings are Freedom 100 Emerging Markets ETF stock at 8.06%, Micron Technology at 7.17%, Vanguard FTSE Developed Markets ETF at 7.00%, Nebius Group at 6.68%, and Vanguard S&P 500 ETF at 6.53%.

overview.description: The Nicholas Global Equity and Income ETF (GIAX) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund invests in globally listed stocks of index-tracking ETFs while employing a daily credit call spread strategy. The actively managed fund-of-funds primarily seeks high current income and, secondarily, capital appreciation. GIAX was launched on Jul 29, 2024 and is issued by Nicholas.
